# Franchise Marketing Systems (FMS)

> Full-service franchise consulting firm founded in 2009. Specializes in helping
> proven SMB owners structure, launch, and sell franchises — without losing what makes
> their business worth franchising. 979 brands franchised, 11,340 franchise units sold,
> 234 successful exits. 67 in-house consultants across 7 global offices.

## About

FMS (Franchise Marketing Systems) is the only franchise consulting firm that handles
franchise development, franchise sales, AND ongoing management support under one roof.
Founded in 2009 and headquartered in Alpharetta, GA, with offices in Boston, Miami,
Toronto, Vietnam, Abuja, and Barbados.

Core services:
- Franchise Development: FDD preparation, operations manuals, training programs, brand standards
- Franchise Sales: Franchisee sourcing, qualification, pipeline management, and closing
- Management & Support: Ongoing franchisee support, discovery days, brand standards compliance
- Franchise Business Plan: Investor-ready business plans for emerging franchisors
- Efficiency Audit: Pre-franchise operational audits
- Digital Marketing: Franchise lead generation, branding, and franchisor website design

Key statistics:
- 979+ brands franchised (since 2009)
- 11,340 franchise units sold across client portfolio
- 234 brands that have successfully sold and exited
- 67 in-house franchise consultants
- 15+ years in business

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://fms-franchise.vercel.app/): Overview, process, case studies, assessment CTA
- [How We Help / Services](https://fms-franchise.vercel.app/services): All service lines overview
- [Franchise Development](https://fms-franchise.vercel.app/services/franchise-development): FDD, ops manuals, training
- [Franchise Sales](https://fms-franchise.vercel.app/services/franchise-sales): Franchisee sourcing and closing
- [Management & Support](https://fms-franchise.vercel.app/services/management-support): Ongoing franchisee support
- [Efficiency Audit](https://fms-franchise.vercel.app/services/efficiency-audit): Pre-franchise operational audit
- [Franchise Business Plan](https://fms-franchise.vercel.app/services/franchise-business-plan): Investor-ready plans
- [Digital Marketing](https://fms-franchise.vercel.app/services/digital-marketing): Franchise lead gen and branding
- [Success Stories / Case Studies](https://fms-franchise.vercel.app/case-studies): Client outcomes with metrics
- [Client Portfolio](https://fms-franchise.vercel.app/our-clients): 979+ brand portfolio
- [Industries We've Franchised](https://fms-franchise.vercel.app/industries): 10 industry verticals
- [Resources / Learn](https://fms-franchise.vercel.app/learn): Education hub — what is franchising, FAQs, guides
- [Free Feasibility Assessment](https://fms-franchise.vercel.app/feasibility-questionnaire): Franchise readiness questionnaire
- [About FMS](https://fms-franchise.vercel.app/about): Company story, team, A-Z approach
- [Contact](https://fms-franchise.vercel.app/contact): 7 global office locations, booking form
